articles.title: Noem reveals Trump will have 'big agreement' to announce at major summit with world leaders - Fox News
articles.description: Kristi Noem will join President Donald Trump and 12 Latin American leaders at his Doral resort for Saturday’s "Shield of the Americas" summit on regional security partnerships.
articles.content: Kristi Noem will reportedly join President Donald Trump and 12 Latin American leaders at his resort in Florida for a "Shield of the Americas" summit Saturday after her ouster as the Secretary of Home… [+3945 chars]
